title: Oxford Homeware Double Duvet Set Grey Brushed Microfiber 4 Piece Double Bedding Set with Fitted Sheet and Pillowcases Soft Breathable Duvet Cover Sets
features: Bedding Set - Double 4 piece double bedding set includes 1 Duvet cover measuring 200 x 200 cm, 1 fitted sheet measuring 135 x 190 cm with 30 cm deep pocket and 2 pillowcases measuring 50 x75 cm envelope closure.
Brushed Microfiber - Brushed microfiber fabric makes the Double duvet cover set exceptionally soft, smooth and comfortable that keeps you warm in winters and cool during the summers.
All Around Elastic - All-around elastic ensures the fitted sheet easily fits onto the mattress. Provides a secure fit and a neat, polished look for your bed.
Shrink & Fade Resistant - The microfiber material is specially processed to resist shrinkage and fading, ensuring the Double bedding set stays in excellent condition and lasts longer.
Care & Washing - Machine wash cold on a gentle cycle,Avoid bleach to maintain quality,Tumble dry on low heat and iron on low if needed.
